procedure.name: Atomic Red Team validation for T1059.004
procedure.description: Automated emulation procedure for T1059.004 executed via Invoke-AtomicRedTeam inside the Metatron lab environment.

sigma.title: AWS EC2 Startup Shell Script Change
Potential Abuse of Linux Magic System Request Key
Suspicious Filename with Embedded Base64 Commands

osquery.name: t1059_004_shell_proc
osquery.query_text: SELECT pid, parent, name, path, cmdline, uid FROM processes WHERE name IN ('bash','sh','dash','zsh','ksh','csh','tcsh','fish') ORDER BY start_time DESC LIMIT 100;

osquery.name: t1059_004_shell_history
osquery.query_text: SELECT path, filename, size, mtime FROM file WHERE path LIKE '%/.bash_history' OR path LIKE '%/.zsh_history' OR path LIKE '%/.sh_history';

osquery_matches.name: t1059_004_shell_proc
osquery_matches.query_text: SELECT pid, parent, name, path, cmdline, uid FROM processes WHERE name IN ('bash','sh','dash','zsh','ksh','csh','tcsh','fish') ORDER BY start_time DESC LIMIT 100;
